info_plist.NSCameraUsageDescription: To upload media to your circles, Innerr requires camera access.
info_plist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: To make new recordings, Innerr requires microphone access to record video with audio.
info_plist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Before you can post media to your circles, Innerr requires photo library access to select media.
info_plist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs permission to save photos and videos to your library.
